author: DominicVainMod
content:
Iris' Blessing Upcoming Events!,Iris' Blessing is just getting started! Here's what you can look forward to next and when:

    Double XP Weekend: November 28 to November 30 (Double XP weekend means double the Ink earnings and double the zXP for z.ink!)
  $5,000 Monthly Drawing: December 12

Want to get started and start earning tickets? Learn how to here:⁠📢┃announcements⁠

@everyone
